section_name: Rules establishing standards for slow-moving vehicle emblems
text:
The Department of Transportation shall adopt rules for slow-moving vehicle emblems for purposes of ORS 815.110 (Requirements for and use of slow-moving vehicle emblem) and 815.115 (Violation of emblem requirements) . The rules adopted under this section shall:

(1) Require a slow-moving vehicle emblem that is reflectorized or fluorescent and that is of a standard type.

(2) Establish design and mounting requirements that the emblem must meet.

(3) Conform to the nationally accepted standards for slow-moving vehicle emblems. [1983 c.338 §444]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 815. Vehicle Equip. Generally
##### § 815.060 — Rules establishing standards for slow-moving vehicle emblems

The Department of Transportation shall adopt rules for slow-moving vehicle emblems for purposes of ORS 815.110 (Requirements for and use of slow-moving vehicle emblem) and 815.115 (Violation of emblem requirements) . The rules adopted under this section shall:

(1) Require a slow-moving vehicle emblem that is reflectorized or fluorescent and that is of a standard type.

(2) Establish design and mounting requirements that the emblem must meet.

(3) Conform to the nationally accepted standards for slow-moving vehicle emblems. [1983 c.338 §444]

subsections.text: The Department of Transportation shall adopt rules for slow-moving vehicle emblems for purposes of ORS 815.110 (Requirements for and use of slow-moving vehicle emblem) and 815.115 (Violation of emblem requirements) . The rules adopted under this section shall:
Require a slow-moving vehicle emblem that is reflectorized or fluorescent and that is of a standard type.
Establish design and mounting requirements that the emblem must meet.
Conform to the nationally accepted standards for slow-moving vehicle emblems. [1983 c.338 §444]
